name: GOLFTEC Jersey City
address: 125 18th St Suite A02, Jersey City, NJ 07310
about: GOLFTEC Jersey City is a golf training and fitting center that utilizes advanced technology, including OPTIMOTION motion capture and launch monitors, to provide data-driven swing analysis and personalized coaching. The facility offers private lessons, club fittings, and practice memberships aimed at helping golfers of all skill levels improve their game through structured programs. With its focus on technology and professional instruction, GOLFTEC caters to players seeking a systematic approach to golf improvement and equipment optimization.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced motion-tracking technology provides precise swing feedback
Data-driven coaching offers a personalized improvement path
Custom club fitting leads to measurable distance gains (avg 21 yards)
Structured practice memberships include video analysis and launch monitor access

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar launch monitor used for fitting and lessons

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, GOLFTEC provides clubs for lessons and fittings, though you're welcome to bring your own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drink?
faq.answer: No outside food or beverages are mentioned as being permitted at the facility.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: With simulator technology, 18 holes can typically be played in 1-2 hours depending on the format and number of players.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: While not specifically mentioned, the structured lessons and technology could be suitable for junior golfers with proper coaching.
